title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines · Language Clinic: Python Pyproject Basics
summary: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python pyproject basics increment in an installable data-report command. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Read and author basic pyproject metadata, build-system, script entry point, and tool configuration boundaries.
Create isolated virtual environments and record direct dependency and supported-Python constraints reproducibly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
